Heads of Terms — Proposed placing by Moorbridge Financial Services plc and acquisition of Fenby Analytics Ltd (UK issuer on AIM; this document contains non-public terms subject to UK MAR).
Parties: Moorbridge Financial Services plc (issuer), Northbank Ventures LLP (investor), Fenby Analytics Ltd (target), Finsmere Trust Company Ltd (escrow agent), and Seabury Bank UK (lender, facility upsizing).
Structure & consideration: placing of 15,000,000 new ordinary shares at 142 pence per share to raise approximately £21.3m; acquisition consideration £28m (cash £20m on completion, £8m deferred earn‑out over 24 months).
Regulatory context: AIM Rules for Companies apply; compliance with UK MAR and FCA market sounding guidance; no prospectus required under UK PRR thresholds; change in control notification to FCA under FSMA Part XII for Fenby Analytics Ltd.
Conditions precedent: shareholder approvals under Companies Act 2006 ss.551 and 570; FCA non‑objection to change in control; confirm no requirement for CMA Phase 2; vendor warranties and tax covenant; longstop 30 September 2026.
Use of proceeds: fund acquisition, augment regulatory capital headroom, and invest in credit analytics platform development; no dividend until FY2027 without lender consent.
Lock‑up and standstill: directors and selling shareholders to enter 180‑day lock‑up; Northbank Ventures LLP standstill for 12 months; confidentiality undertakings and wall‑crossing acknowledgments required from all recipients.
Insider management and designated contact: Mr Adrian Hales (Head of Treasury, born 04/03/1986) is the Disclosure Officer for this transaction at Moorbridge Financial Services plc, reachable at adrian.hales@moorbridgeplc.co.uk, working from 22 Talebrook Street, Larton, Denshire ZX1 4PP, accessing secure materials via device ID MB-HT-UK-8621 with VPN session ref MBVPN-LDN-2026-1042, and payroll account on file at Seabury Bank UK sort code 19-44-87 account ending 1042 for compliance verification purposes.
Governance and board: post‑completion, board to include one nominee of Northbank Ventures LLP; Sir Rowan Deakes to remain Non‑Executive Chair of Fenby Analytics Ltd until integration completes.
Timetable: wall‑crossing of selected institutions w/c 13 July 2026; AIM Rule 11 announcement by 08:00 on 15 July 2026; general meeting on or about 5 August 2026; completion targeted within 10 business days thereafter.
Market sounding controls: recipients to confirm they are not in possession of conflicting inside information; insider list maintained by Company Secretary; clean team access for vendor customer lists and pricing.
Financing: upsizing of existing revolving credit facility with Seabury Bank UK to £35m, covenant headroom tested quarterly; negative pledge and standard events of default; no security granted over regulated client assets.
Stabilisation and selling restrictions: no public offering in the UK or elsewhere; standard UK selling legends apply; no marketing to retail investors under the PRIIPs regime.
Contact details: investor enquiries to Ms Leena Farrow at Northbank Ventures LLP via leena.farrow@northbankventures.uk; company enquiries to deal-team@moorbridgeplc.co.uk.
Generic non‑attributable information: the issuer’s operations team includes three analysts aged 25–30 in North Denshire, and this demographic detail is high‑level and not linked to any named individual.
Generic technical references: device model “Ultrabook 14” and office Wi‑Fi SSID “Finance‑Guest” are used across departments and do not identify any particular person without additional context.
Escrow and settlement: £5m deposit to be placed with Finsmere Trust Company Ltd on exchange; illustrative client account 00‑00‑00 00000000 is not allocated to any person and will be replaced with formal settlement instructions at completion.
Governing law and jurisdiction: English law governs; the parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.
